testcase.name: test_multichip_sharded_residual_candidate[blackhole-blackhole-1x4-ring]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_THROW @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/impl/program/program.cpp:1549: tt::exception info: Statically allocated circular buffers in program 156 clash with L1 buffers on core range [0-0 - 3-0]. L1 buffer allocated at 1017600 and static circular buffer region ends at 1405760 backtrace: --- /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/build_Release/lib/libtt_metal.so(+0x8ec543) [0x76baedcec543] --- tt::tt_metal::detail::ProgramImpl::validate_circular_buffer_region(tt::tt_metal::IDevice const*) --- /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/build_Release/lib/libtt_metal.so(+0xbc4d73) [0x76baedfc4d73] --- /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/build_Release/lib/libtt_metal.so(+0xa6c7e3) [0x76baede6c7e3] --- /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6(+0xf5c79) [0x76bb34675c79] --- /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6(+0x9caa4) [0x76bb37131aa4] --- /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6(__clone+0x44) [0x76bb371bea64]

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices) record_property = <function record_property.<locals>.append_property at 0x76ba9f26e0c0>
@_mesh_test def test_multichip_sharded_residual_candidate(mesh_device, record_property): """Measure a coherent two-layer sharded-residual decode family."""
candidate_id = os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_RESIDUAL_CANDIDATE") if candidate_id not in RESIDUAL_CANDIDATES: pytest.skip(f"set MULTICHIP_RESIDUAL_CANDIDATE to one of {sorted(RESIDUAL_CANDIDATES)}") config = _config() state = _real_state() ccl = get_tt_ccl(mesh_device) control = MultiChipDecoder.from_state_dict( state, hf_config=config, layer_idx=LAYER_IDX, mesh_device=mesh_device, batch=1, max_cache_len=MAX_CACHE_LEN, tt_ccl=ccl, ) candidate = MultiChipDecoder.from_state_dict( state, hf_config=config, layer_idx=LAYER_IDX, mesh_device=mesh_device, batch=1, max_cache_len=MAX_CACHE_LEN, multichip_config=replace(MultiChipConfig(), **RESIDUAL_CANDIDATES[candidate_id]), tt_ccl=ccl, ) host = torch.randn( (1, 1, 1, config.hidden_size), generator=torch.Generator().manual_seed(7211), dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) control_input = _mesh_input(host, mesh_device) candidate_input = _mesh_sharded_residual_input(host, mesh_device) control_key_0, control_value_0 = _mesh_contiguous_caches(config, mesh_device, batch=1) control_key_1, control_value_1 = _mesh_contiguous_caches(config, mesh_device, batch=1) candidate_key_0, candidate_value_0 = _mesh_contiguous_caches(config, mesh_device, batch=1) candidate_key_1, candidate_value_1 = _mesh_contiguous_caches(config, mesh_device, batch=1)
control_layer_0 = control.decode_forward(control_input, control_key_0, control_value_0, current_pos=7) control_layer_1 = control.decode_forward(control_layer_0, control_key_1, control_value_1, current_pos=7) > candidate_layer_0 = candidate.decode_forward( candidate_input, candidate_key_0, candidate_value_0, current_pos=7 )
models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:959: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:2229: in decode_forward return self._decode_forward_device_position( models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:2175: in _decode_forward_device_position hidden_states = self._mlp_decode_flat(hidden_states) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1804: in _mlp_decode_flat gate_up = self._all_gather_matmul_flat( models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1726: in _all_gather_matmul_flat _, output = ttnn.experimental.all_gather_matmul_async( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = FastOperation(python_fully_qualified_name='ttnn.experimental.all_gather_matmul_async', function=<ttnn._ttnn.operations.experimental.ccl_experimental.all_gather_matmul_async_t object at 0x76baa3850770>, preprocess_golden_function_inputs=None, golden_function=None, postprocess_golden_function_outputs=None, is_cpp_operation=True, is_experimental=False) function_args = (device_id: 3, def __call__(self, *function_args, **function_kwargs): cq_id = None if "queue_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("queue_id") elif "cq_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("cq_id")
recording = ttnn.graph.is_python_io_recording_enabled() if recording: ttnn.graph.track_function_start(self.python_fully_qualified_name) ttnn.graph.record_python_operation(self.python_fully_qualified_name, function_args, function_kwargs) input_tensors = get_all_tensors((function_args, function_kwargs)) set_tensor_id(input_tensors)
try: if cq_id is None: > result = self.function(*function_args, **function_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: TT_THROW @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/impl/program/program.cpp:1549: tt::exception E info: E Statically allocated circular buffers in program 156 clash with L1 buffers on core range [0-0 - 3-0].
